description: The keyboard companion to tap-emit (E3): a per-entity behavior that emits a game event on the down-edge of any of `keys`, so title/over screens are keyboard-accessible as pure data with no host keydown bridge. Put it on the same flow-button entity as tap-emit, emitting the same event, and wire it to a scene.flow.on transition. Adopts a key held across the spawning scene change so it only fires on a fresh press.
